event: Node rotation in us-east-1c increased the share of auth-api pods scheduled in that zone
Token refresh error alerts fired, but synthetic identity probes remained healthy
Initial hypothesis focused on flaky identity-provider behavior because application logs showed timeouts and incomplete mTLS handshakes
AZ-level metrics revealed errors concentrated in us-east-1c while dependency probes from other zones remained green
CNI policy-drop logs and recent network policy commits pointed to blocked egress from auth pods in us-east-1c
Token refresh success returned to baseline after rollback
